_meta.purpose: Which models the mChatAI Cloud (compute-token) provider exposes. sourceProviders = providers resold WHOLESALE (every active model, x markup). curatedOpenRouter = SPECIFIC OpenRouter slugs ALSO surfaced via Cloud (a curated short-list, NOT the full 400+). Read by macOS CloudProvider.computedMchataiCloudModels() via MchataisourceCacheService. Edit + git push + refreshMchataisourceCache ships with no app rebuild (RULE #1).
_meta.fallback: binary carries [anthropic,openai,google,perplexity] + [] curatedOpenRouter as _fallback_only defaults (offline first-launch)
_meta.server_note: A curatedOpenRouter slug ALSO requires the compute-proxy PAID_PASSTHROUGH_ALLOWLIST env to include that slug (server allow-gate at index.js), and the catalog entry must keep directApiName:null so the id passes through verbatim to OpenRouter.
